steps.title: Go to the input value
steps.content: $f(2)$ means the $y$-value on the graph when $x=2$. Use the vertical line $x=2$ to locate that point on the graph.

steps.title: Read the output value
steps.content: At $x=2$, the graph is on the $x$-axis, so the point is $(2,0)$ and $f(2)=0$.

steps.title: Match the value to a choice
steps.content: The value $0$ is listed in the choices. The answer is D.
